_comment: Mile/Medium specialist (Mile=A, Medium=A, Long=B, Sprint=F per Android DB). Closest in profile to Oguri Cap but with weaker Long aptitude, so the Long-distance stamina floor stays a touch lower. Speed/Power/Wit priority matching the Mile-runner template.

4._comment: Trackblazer. Stamina floor at 425 (Long=B so she CAN compete in long if needed, but the build prioritizes Mile/Medium). targetOptionalRaceCount 40 like Oguri to push race density up.
